title: the truth about Loyola Maryland || why i chose to go, making friends, social life, professors
body: I loved my school too! I went to Bridgewater State University for psychology and I honestly fell in love at first site. I got a tour and the campus was old but updated so it was really pretty and everyone was saying hi to the tour guide it had a really friendly vibe. Then what sealed the deal was the LGBT center, I saw they were thinking forward. I am a strong advocate for small schools near the city. It's small but diverse. I granted a couple years ago and it was like a wedding day everyone was together and it was such a good day! lol didn't mean to gush!
author: @lizzlocke3130

title: the truth about Loyola Maryland || why i chose to go, making friends, social life, professors
body: I am applying to Loyola on spring 2021. However, i will be 20 years old when i get there, therefore i will be underage. It makes me sad not being able to party because in Spain you can drink and do whatever you want when you pass 18 (i am from Spain btw, i will be a exchange student). Do you know if 20 year old students party in Baltimore? If they do so, what do they do to be able to party? I really want to have an amazing experience at Loyola and i am afraid that if i don't go out i won't have a good social life. I could be wrong tho.

title: A Day in the Life at the University of Chicago vs. Northwestern University
body: I attended NU but my son attends  UChicago. Just realized NU doesn’t have a traditional quad, but lake is awesome. Meanwhile UChicgo has beautiful quads and gardens and look-at-me artistic elements on gothic buildings. In the end, NU feels like vacation spot especially summertime, while UChicago feels like a sacred place of learning. As my curiosity deepens with age, I revere the study more.
author: @stacysaunders7708

title: A Day in the Life at the University of Chicago vs. Northwestern University

author: @bluephoenix8630

title: A Day in the Life at the University of Chicago vs. Northwestern University
body: DePaul is better for college. A wonderful private, Catholic, Big East Conference university. It’s located right in the best neighborhood in Chicago (Lincoln Park)—not in sketch south side of Chicago, not far away Evanston. DePaul has a primacy in teaching—not research. For college-level students, that’s often better than a research-intensive university.
author: @user-fs8tl7ni1w

title: A Day in the Life at the University of Chicago vs. Northwestern University
body:
DePaul is best! ​​⁠Northwestern is in a suburb outside of Chicago; UChicago is in a terrible neighborhood in Chicago. DePaul is in a phenomenal neighborhood in the best part of Chicago.

I would rather send my kids to DePaul than either of those two other schools. It’s a better college atmosphere. Most people don’t want to live in a suburb or in a sketch part of a city for college.
author: @user-fs8tl7ni1w

title: Loyola University Maryland on The College Tour | Full Episode (Amazon Prime)

So if you feel like I should not go with him anymore, he is mad at me or I had sinned a lot, that is the devil talking, because God said in the Bible in Romans 8:38-39 "For I am persuaded that neither death nor life, nor angels nor principalities nor powers, nor things present nor things to come, nor height nor depth, nor any other created thing shall be able to separate us from the love of God which is in Christ Jesus our Lord."
